title: Chinas Coastal Surge And An Unprecedented Lunar New Year
section_path: Chinas Coastal Surge And An Unprecedented Lunar New Year
section_path_text: Chinas Coastal Surge And An Unprecedented Lunar New Year
summary:
Main
by Jeffrey Landsberg
Dry bulk rates were mixed last week, with capesize and panamax rates falling while supramax and handysize rates surged even further. The fact that supramax and handysize rates were again able to rise by such a large amount (supramax led the way, rising last week by an impressive 24%) has shown that the overall spot imbalance that led to last month's initial surge in freight rates remains largely in place. As we also discussed in our most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report and Weekly China Report, also of significance is that Chinese coastal coal freight rates jumped by an extremely large amount last week.
